name: orchestrator
description: Autonomous GitHub issue resolution loop (experimental). Lead Claude thread + 7 teammates (issue-analyzer / tester / issue-scout / product-planner / roadmap-strategist / vision-critic / system-doctor) + auto-invoked loopd /dev-task. Configurable response language, per-repo parallel instances, and self-healing stall recovery. See docs/orchestrator-design.md + docs/orchestrator-planning-layer.md.
